title: Judges Panel Configuration
description: Configuration schema for .judgesrc / .judgesrc.json files used by the Judges Panel CLI.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE validation.

preset.description: Named preset or comma-separated composition (e.g. "security-only" or "security-only,performance"). Individual settings override preset values.

disabledJudges.description: Judge IDs to skip during evaluation (e.g. ["accessibility", "documentation"]).

minSeverity.description: Minimum finding severity to report. Anything below this threshold is filtered out.

languages.description: Languages to restrict analysis to. When empty, all languages are analyzed.

severity.description: Override the default severity for this rule.

ruleOverrides.description: Per-rule overrides keyed by rule ID or wildcard prefix (e.g. "SEC-*").

failOnFindings.description: Exit with code 1 when the verdict is fail. Useful for CI pipelines.

baseline.description: Path to a baseline JSON file. Findings matching the baseline are suppressed.

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude files from analysis (e.g. ["**/*.test.ts", "**/fixtures/**"]).

include.description: Glob patterns to include only matching files (e.g. ["**/*.py", "**/*.ts"]). When specified, only matching files are analyzed.

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files to analyze when scanning a directory.
